chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1662 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of M.A. 6585/2025 For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Mr. Mukesh Kumar Oad, Advocate for Petitioners along with petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh along with along with IO/Inspector Sohail Ahmed Pathan PS mri Jalbani ---- Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan Advocate files vakalatnama along with Counter Affidavit in shape of objections on behalf of Respondent No.5, which is taken on record. Petitioner No.1 Mst Dilshadan present in Court states that she has contracted second marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own volition, free from coercion or pressure after getting divorce from her ex-husband namely Nooruddin, hence being annoyed the Respondent No.5 Manthar (brother of her ex-husband), has lodged subject F.I.R., which is false. The I.O. of the case present today has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Dilshadan, who in her statement has confirmed her marriage with petitioner No.2 and denied the contents of FIR. The I.O. further submits that in the light of said statement of petitioner No.1, a report before the learned Magistrate concerned would be submitted disposing of the case. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the said terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, learned Magistrate before whom if the report disposing of the case is filed shall pass an appropriate order disposing of the case as recommended, in accordance with law.

Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. However, learned Magistrate before whom if the report disposing of the case is filed shall pass an appropriate order disposing of the case as recommended, in accordance with law. The petitioners shall be provided protection in accordance with law as and when required. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
